conflictDeleteForm.descriptionMaster: This form has been updated in the master version. You need to refresh the page first to remove it.

rule.name: The name must be unique within the registry instance and contain 3-50 characters. Permissible characters include lowercase 'a-z', uppercase 'A-Z', numbers '0-9', hyphens '-', and underscores '_'. Note: Numbers and hyphens cannot be used at the beginning or end of the name.
rule.title: The title can contain 3 to 100 characters. Permissible characters include uppercase 'A-Z', lowercase 'a-z', numbers '0-9', hyphens '-', underscores '_', a comma ',', periods '.', apostrophe ('), and spaces.

text.scriptContainsErrors: The script code may contain errors. You can save the script but the business process may not run.

deleteConfirmation.confirmText: The business processes of the group "{{groupName}}" will be moved to the list of ungrouped services.

information.title: Display in user portals
information.description: You can group business processes, sort groups, and available services for display in user portals. Users will only see the services to which they have access. A group will only be displayed if its business processes are available to the user.

cancelChanges.title: Undo changes?
cancelChanges.description: The service display will return to the last saved state.

navigationConfirm.title: Leave page?
navigationConfirm.text: Service display order has been changed. Leaving the page now will discard any unsaved changes.

moveProcess.moveDescription: Move the business process "{{processName}}" to another group or remove it from the current one? It will be added to the end of the selected business process list.

text.caption: A portal for designing and configuring digital services. Create and manage business processes, UI forms, and service configuration.

text.inconsistency: The attribute values in the file must match those in the Qualified Electronic Signature (QES) issued by the organization for work with the registry. Otherwise, users cannot log into the Officer Portal or sign tasks with a QES.

text.hint: The master version is read-only. Create a candidate version to edit the email settings.
text.supportDescription: If users receive a critical error, they can contact support at this address.
text.registryNameDescription: The full name is the official legal name of the registry. It is used in official correspondence, documents, user portal footers, etc. The abbreviated name is used in informal communication, as well as where there is not enough space for the full name, for example, at the top of user portals.
text.themeDescription: The selected theme applies to all portals (Citizen portal, Officer portal, Digital Services Development Platform). It does not affect the Control Plane interface.

fields.registryFullNameRules: Can be between 3 and 512 characters long. Valid characters: "A-Z", "a-z", "0-9", "-", ",", ".", apostrophe ('), space. The registry name must start with three letters.
fields.registryNameRules: Can have from 1 to 42 characters. Valid characters: "A-Z", "a-z", "0-9", "-", ",", ".", apostrophe ('), space. The registry short name must start with at least one letter.

formRenderer.tooltipFileMinSize: The value must be a positive number, with a dot as a separator in the case of decimal fractions, with units of B, KB, MB or GB (the value without a unit of measurement will be read in bytes) and not exceed the value of the «File Maximum Size»
formRenderer.tooltipFileMaxSize: The value must be a positive number, separated by a dot in the case of decimal fractions, with units of B, KB, MB, or GB (a value without a unit will be read in bytes) and not exceed the default value, which set by registry administrator
formRenderer.tooltipFileMinTotalSize: The value must be a positive number, with a dot as a separator in the case of decimal fractions, with measurement units of B, KB, MB or GB (the value without a measurement unit will be read in bytes) and not exceed the value of the field «Maximum total size»
formRenderer.tooltipFileMaxTotalSize: The value must be a positive number, separated by a dot in the case of decimal fractions, with units of B, KB, MB, or GB (a value without a unit will be read in bytes) and not exceed the default value of set by registry administrator
formRenderer.moreThanMaxValueSetByAdministrator: The maximum value set by the registry administrator has been exceeded
formRenderer.invalidComponentValue: We noticed an unsupported value was used. No worries, reach out to the registry administrator for a bit of help.

serverMessages.ERROR_LIBRARY_LOAD: An error occurred when loading base libraries
serverMessages.ERROR_READ_SETTINGS: An error occurred while reading parameters
serverMessages.ERROR_TRANSMIT_REQUEST: An error occurred while transmitting a request to the CA server via HTTP
serverMessages.ERROR_MEMORY_ALLOCATION: An error occurred while allocating memory
serverMessages.ERROR_PROXY_NOT_AUTHORIZED: Authentication to the proxy server failed or is not possible
serverMessages.ERROR_NO_GUI_DIALOGS: Dialogue with the operator is not supported
serverMessages.ERROR_DOWNLOAD_FILE: An error occurred while downloading a file from an HTTP server
serverMessages.ERROR_WRITE_SETTINGS: An error occurred while writing parameters
serverMessages.ERROR_CANCELED_BY_GUI: The operation was canceled by the operator
serverMessages.ERROR_OFFLINE_MODE: Access to the CA server is not possible (offline mode is enabled)
serverMessages.ERROR_KEY_MEDIAS_FAILED: An error occurred while working with the key media
serverMessages.ERROR_KEY_MEDIAS_ACCESS_FAILED: An error occurred while accessing key media
serverMessages.ERROR_KEY_MEDIAS_READ_FAILED: An error occurred while reading private key from key media
serverMessages.ERROR_KEY_MEDIAS_WRITE_FAILED: An error occurred while writing private key to key media
serverMessages.WARNING_KEY_MEDIAS_READ_ONLY: Key media does not support data destruction
serverMessages.ERROR_KEY_MEDIAS_DELETE: An error occurred while deleting private key from key media
serverMessages.ERROR_KEY_MEDIAS_CLEAR: An error occurred while clearing key media
serverMessages.ERROR_BAD_PRIVATE_KEY: An error occurred while opening private key (wrong password or key is damaged)
serverMessages.ERROR_PKI_FORMATS_FAILED: An error occurred while parsing or generating data (data is damaged or format is wrong)
serverMessages.ERROR_CSP_FAILED: An error occurred while performing cryptographic transformations
serverMessages.ERROR_BAD_SIGNATURE: Sorry, the signature did not pass validation. Please try again
serverMessages.ERROR_AUTH_FAILED: An error occurred during authentication (authentication data is damaged)
serverMessages.ERROR_NOT_RECEIVER: The private key owner is not in the CRL
serverMessages.ERROR_STORAGE_FAILED: An error occurred when working with a file-based certificate store and lists of revoked certificates
serverMessages.ERROR_BAD_CERT: The certificate is damaged or cannot be used
serverMessages.ERROR_INVALID_CERT_TIME: The certificate or the corresponding private key has expired
serverMessages.ERROR_CERT_IN_CRL: Certificate is not valid (when checking with CRL)
serverMessages.ERROR_NO_VALID_CRLS: No valid CRLs were found (perhaps an error occurred while downloading them from the KCA server or downloading is not possible)
serverMessages.ERROR_GET_TIME_STAMP: An error occurred while getting time stamp
serverMessages.ERROR_BAD_TSP_RESPONSE: An error occurred while parsing the response from the TSP server
serverMessages.ERROR_TSP_SERVER_CERT_INVALID: TSP server certificate is not valid (valid CRLs may not be found)
serverMessages.ERROR_GET_OCSP_STATUS: An error occurred while trying to get the status of the certificate over the OCSP protocol
serverMessages.ERROR_BAD_OCSP_RESPONSE: An error occurred while parsing the response from the OCSP server
serverMessages.ERROR_CERT_BAD_BY_OCSP: Certificate is not valid (when checking with the OCSP protocol)
serverMessages.ERROR_OCSP_SERVER_CERT_INVALID: OCSP server certificate is not valid (valid CRLs may not be found)
serverMessages.ERROR_LDAP_ERROR: An error occurred while working with LDAP server
serverMessages.ERROR_SIGNATURE_EXPIRED: The difference between the signature and the current time has exceeded the allowed interval
serverMessages.ERROR_SIGNATURE_DRFO_MISMATCH: DRFO code of the signature and the user do not match
serverMessages.ERROR_SIGNATURE_EDRPOU_MISMATCH: EDRPOU code of the signature and the user do not match
serverMessages.ERROR_SIGNATURE_NAME_MISMATCH: Name of the signature and the user do not match
serverMessages.ERROR_EMPTY_DRFO: The signature does not contain the DRFO code. Please use another signature
serverMessages.ERROR_EMPTY_EDRPOU: You are authenticated as a legal entity. Please use a legal entity key to sign
serverMessages.ERROR_EMPTY_FULL_NAME: Use of a seal is not supported. Please use a personalized key
serverMessages.ERROR_EMPTY_TIME_INFO: The signature does not contain a time stamp
serverMessages.ERROR_UNKNOWN_ESEAL: The seal is not authorized for signing
serverMessages.ERROR_INVALID_JWT: The user token does not contain the necessary attributes
serverMessages.ERROR_NOT_EMPTY_EDRPOU: You are authenticated as an individual. Please use an individual key to sign
serverMessages.ERROR_EMPTY_ALLOWED_SUBJECT: The type of validation rules packet is not specified
serverMessages.ERROR_NOT_ENTREPRENEUR_SIGNATURE: You used the key of a representative of a private entrepreneur or a legal entity. Please use your own private entrepreneur key
serverMessages.ERROR_EMPTY_ENTREPRENEUR_EDRPOU: You are authenticated as an individual entrepreneur. Please use an individual entrepreneur key to sign
serverMessages.ERROR_EMPTY_TOKEN_EDRPOU: You are authenticated as an individual. Please use an individual key to sign
